style_direction: Magazine/editorial typography with left sidebar for quick-scan info and right main column for narrative
intended_users: Candidates who want a clean, typography-driven aesthetic
locked_layout_rules: A4 portrait, one page, zero print margin
No color highlights — hierarchy through weight and size only
Main content bottom whitespace must not exceed 15%
component_slots: sidebar: education, core skills (tag layout), qr
main: intro, experience entries, project entries

ai_may_decide: Whether sidebar includes certificates, languages, or tools
Whether to add campus/volunteer experience in sidebar or main

qa_gates: screenshot: no overlap, clipping, or collision
